title: AI Resume Matcher
description: Make hiring easy by Screening resumes with AI, Match candidates to job requirements

title: Bionic Hand
description: The project develops a multi-finger bionic hand driven by DC motors and controlled by an STM32L476RGTx microcontroller, integrating flex-sensor-based position feedback, current-based load sensing, and real-time closed loop control.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe Model
description: AI-based Tic-Tac-Toe system using YOLO object detection on STM32MP257 for board recognition.

title: Wheel Encoderless Robot Odometry
description: Developed a low-cost odometry system using a mouse sensor and smartphone magnetometer to estimate robot position and orientation without wheel encoders.
